name: linear-dep-chain-mission
description: Mission workflow-import: 4-workstream linear dependency chain completed in ~2h. All merges clean (tier 1). Builder circuit breaker false-trips from stale retry records caused workaround overhead in ws3/ws4.

name: coordinator-freeze-sender-whitelist
description: MISSION_PENDING_SENDERS in mail-bridge.ts only includes coordinator-mission, coordinator, mission-analyst, execution-director. Dynamic mission-scoped names like coordinator-webui-X do NOT trigger auto-freeze. Must send from 'coordinator' to trigger freeze.
